entities.name: STATUS_INVALID_BUFFER_SIZE
entities.description: The buffer size is invalid. One of the provider data blocks is too small. For example, if during PcwRegister call the provider specifies offset 100 for counter X in the first data block of 4 bytes, but PcwAddInstance call specifies the first data block as 50 bytes, this error status is returned.

entities.name: WppRecorderGetTriageInfo
entities.description: Retrieves triage information from WPP recorder logs.

entities.name: WppRecorderLogDelete
entities.description: 删除指定的WPP记录器日志。

parameters.name: RecorderLog
parameters.description: 要删除的记录器日志的句柄。

entities.remarks: 调用此函数后，任何线程都无法再访问该日志缓冲区。

entities.name: WppRecorderLogSetIdentifier
entities.description: Sets a string identifier for a recorder log handle

parameters.name: RecorderLog
parameters.description: 上一次调用 WppRecorderLogCreate中返回的记录器日志句柄。[in] LogIdentifier 要设置的字符串标识符。

entities.remarks: 不要在 WppRecorderLogGetDefault返回的默认日志句柄上调用 WppRecorderLogSetIdentifier。

entities.name: WppRecorderLogCreate
entities.description: Creates a buffer to contain recorder logs.
entities.remarks: 返回 NTSTATUS，该值指示驱动程序是否可以使用 RecorderLog 句柄进行日志记录。 在调用 WppRecorderLogCreate之前，请通过调用 RECORDER_LOG_CREATE_PARAMS_INIT分配 RECORDER_LOG_CREATE_PARAMS 结构并初始化。 必须先调用 WPP_INIT_TRACING，然后才能调用 WppRecorderLogCreate。 除非在调用 WppRecorderLogCreate之前修改 CreateParams 的成员，否则使用默认值。 如果返回成功的 NTSTATUS，驱动程序可以使用 RecorderLog 句柄进行日志记录。 如果未返回成功的 NTSTATUS，驱动程序必须使用默认日志的 RECORDER_LOG 句柄。 此外，驱 动程序不得尝试记录或删除 RecorderLog指向的句柄。７ 备注 此方法从非分页池中为日志缓冲区分配内存。 例 C++

parameters.name: CreateParams
parameters.description: 指向 RECORDER_LOG_CREATE_PARAMS 结构的指针。

entities.name: WPP_RECORDER_TRI_STATE
entities.description: 枚举类型定义 WPP 用于某些结构成员和函数参数的三个值。

members.name: Size
members.description: 此结构的大小。 CreateDefaultLog 指示 WPP 是否应将默认日志用于跟踪消息。 TRUE （默认值），使用默认日志;FALSE 禁 用默认日志。 UseTimeStamp 指示 WPP_RECORDER_TRI_STATE类型的值： 如果设置为 WppRecorderTrue，则会将毫秒粒度的时间戳添加到 WPP 日志条目。如果设置为 WppRecorderFalse，则不会记录时间戳。 如果设置为 WppRecorderDefault，则其效果与 WppRecorderFalse相同，除非驱动程序包的 INF 文件将 WppRecorder_UseTimeStamp 设置为 1，在这种情况下，这意味着 WppRecorderTrue。 此字段从 Windows 11 版本 22H2 开始可用。 有关详细信息，请参阅 登录跟踪记录器（IFR）来记录跟踪。

entities.name: WppRecorderIsDefaultLogAvailable
entities.description: Determines whether the default log is available.

return_value.description: 如果默认日志可用，则为 TRUE;否则为 FALSE。

entities.name: WppRecorderLogGetDefault
entities.description: 获取默认WPP记录器日志的句柄

return_value.description: 默认日志的不透明句柄。

entities.name: DbgPrintEx
entities.description: Outputs a debug message with filtering capabilities. Recommended over DbgPrint as it allows control over message conditions. Parameters include ComponentId (filter ID from Dpfilter.h), Level (importance level), Format string, and variable arguments. Format strings should ideally be static and compile-time defined for security.

parameters.name: ComponentId
parameters.description: 指定调用此例程的组件。 这必须是 Dpfilter.h 头文件中定义的组件名称筛选器 ID 之一。为了避免将驱动程序的输出与 Windows 组件的输出混合，应仅对 ComponentId使用以下值：

entities.name: DPFLTR_IHVVIDEO_ID
entities.description: Debug filter ID for IHV (Independent Hardware Vendor) video components

entities.name: DPFLTR_IHVNETWORK_ID
entities.description: Debug filter ID for IHV network drivers

entities.syntax:
typedef struct _FAULT_INFORMATION {   FAULT_INFORMATION_ARCH Type;
BOOLEAN                IsStage1;   union {

entities.name: KB_ADD_PAGES_FEATURE_MASK
entities.description: Bitmask constant for KB_ADD_PAGES feature flags (shifted by KB_ADD_PAGES_FEATURE_SHIFT)

entities.name: KB_REMOVE_PAGES_FEATURE_MASK
entities.description: Bitmask constant for page removal features, calculated as (0xF << (KB_ADD_PAGES_FEATURE_SHIFT + KB_REMOVE_PAGES_FEATURE_SHIFT))

entities.name: KB_ADD_PAGES_FLAG_VIRTUAL_ADDRESS
entities.description: Specifies that the Address member contains a virtual address.

entities.name: KB_ADD_PAGES_FLAG_PHYSICAL_ADDRESS
entities.description: Flags indicating physical address usage for KB_ADD_PAGES operations

entities.name: KB_ADD_PAGES_FLAG_ADDITIONAL_RANGES_EXIST
entities.description: 指示回调例程请求再次调用它，以便它可以添加更多页面。回调例程必须设置KB_ADD_PAGES_FLAG_VIRTUAL_ADDRESS标志或KB_ADD_PAGES_FLAG_PHYSICAL_ADDRESS标志。

entities.name: DUMP_TYPE_INVALID
entities.description: Invalid dump type value (-1)

entities.name: KBUGCHECK_TRIAGE_DUMP_DATA
entities.description: 结构 _KBUGCHECK_TRIAGE_DUMP_DATA 结构描述转储数据与

entities.name: PKTRIAGE_DUMP_DATA_ARRAY
entities.description: Structure containing triage dump data array information

entities.name: KB_TRIAGE_DUMP_DATA_FLAG_BUGCHECK_ACTIVE
entities.description: 0x00000001 - Indicates the callback was called during a bug check. Currently, this flag should always be set. MaxVirtMemSize specifies the maximum virtual memory size (in bytes) that the callback can add to the dump. The cumulative size of regions described in the data array should not exceed this size.

entities.name: KD_OPTION
entities.description: 枚举类型，指示要访问和更改的内核状态。此参数的值确定InBuffer和OutBuffer的格式和所需长度。

entities.name: KD_OPTION_SET_BLOCK_ENABLE
entities.description: Specifies whether to enable/disable debugger blocking. Caller must set InBufferBytes to sizeof(BOOLEAN), OutBufferBytes to zero, and OutBuffer to NULL; otherwise KdChangeOption returns STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER. If the high bit (0x80) is set in KdBlockEnable system variable, the debugger cannot be re-enabled.

entities.name: STATUS_INVALID_INFO_CLASS
entities.description: Indicates that the specified information class is not valid
entities.remarks: Returned by KdChangeOption when the Option parameter is set to an invalid value. The only currently valid option is KD_OPTION_SET_BLOCK_ENABLE.

entities.name: STATUS_DEBUGGER_INACTIVE
entities.description: If the operating system started without debugging controls, KdDisableDebugger returns STATUS_DEBUGGER_INACTIVE. If the kernel debugger is blocked (i.e., KdBlockEnable system variable is set to a non-FALSE value), KdDisableDebugger returns STATUS_ACCESS_DENIED. After calling KdDisableDebugger to disable the kernel debugger, the caller can use KdEnableDebugger routine to re-enable it.

entities.name: ComponentId
entities.description: Specifies the component calling this routine. Must be one of the component name filter IDs defined in dpfilter.h header file. To avoid mixing driver output with Windows component output, should only be used...

entities.name: KD_DEBUGGER_NOT_PRESENT
entities.description: Indicates whether a kernel debugger is present. Can be modified by Windows or any other kernel-mode binary. Note that the latest return value from KdRefreshDebuggerNotPresent may not match the current value of KD_DEBUGGER_NOT_PRESENT.

entities.name: KtriageDumpDataArray
entities.description: Specifies an uninitialized triage dump data array. Must be allocated from non-paged memory. Size specifies the size of the array in bytes.

entities.name: PcwCallbackAddCounter
entities.description:
与 PcwCallbackRemoveCounter 配合优化数据收集（在没有活动查询时禁用统计跟踪）。回调负责生成计数器集实例的 Name 和 Id 值。要求：
1. InstanceId 必须稳定（同一逻辑实例使用相同Id）、唯一且小于 0xFFFFFFFE
2. 推荐使用有意义的值（如进程ID）
3. InstanceName 必须稳定且唯一
4. 支持多实例时Name不能为空
5. 字符串比较不区分大小写

优化提示：
- 当 CounterMask 不全时，可跳过无关计数器
- 当指定 InstanceId 时，可跳过不匹配实例

entities.name: PCW_VERSION_1
entities.description: Possible values: PCW_VERSION_1 (0x100) or PCW_VERSION_2 (0x200). If Version field is set to an unrecognized value, PcwRegister will return STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER_2. When using CTRPP-generated RegisterXxx or InitRegistrationInformationXxx functions, the Version field will be set to PCW_CURRENT_VERSION, which equals one of these values depending on NTDDI_VERSION compile-time value.

entities.name: NTDDI_VERSION
entities.description: NTDDI version constant for Windows 10 FE (Feature Update)

entities.name: PCW_CURRENT_VERSION
entities.description: Possible values: PCW_VERSION_1 (0x0100), PCW_VERSION_2 (0x0200). If your code is built with NTDDI_VERSION >= NTDDI_WIN10_FE but needs to run on earlier Windows versions, set Version = PCW_VERSION_1 as described in PcwRegister documentation.

entities.name: PCW_REGISTRATION_FLAGS
entities.description: PcwRegistrationNone (0x0) - Default value (no special behavior). PcwRegistrationSiloNeutral (0x1) - Indicates this registration should be visible to consumers in all server silos.
entities.remarks: By default, registrations are only visible to consumers in the server silo that was active when the registration was created (i.e., the silo attached to the thread when PcwRegister was called).

entities.name: PCW_ANY_INSTANCE_ID
entities.description: 表示性能计数器提供程序可以接受任何实例ID的特殊值。如果可能，实例ID应有意义(例如进程计数器集可能使用PID作为ID)而不是任意的(例如序列号)。

entities.name: WppRecorderGetCounterHandle
entities.description: 获取要读取其当前值的计数器的句柄。

return_value.description: 要读取其当前值的计数器的 ID。

entities.name: WPP_RECORDER_COUNTER
entities.description: WPP Recorder Counter structure

parameters.name: CounterOwner
parameters.description: 要读取其当前值的计数器的 ID。

entities.remarks: Used in Windows software tracing (WPP) infrastructure

entities.name: PreciseTimeStamp
entities.description: 指示WPP_RECORDER_TRI_STATE类型的值：如果设置为WppRecorderTrue，则会将十分之一微秒粒度的时间戳添加到WPP日志条目。如果设置为WppRecorderFalse，则不会记录时间戳。如果设置为WppRecorderDefault，则其效果与WppRecorderFalse相同，除非驱动程序包的INF文件将WppRecorder_UseTimeStamp和WppRecorder_PreciseTimeStamp设置为1，在这种情况下，这意味着WppRecorderTrue。此字段从Windows 11版本22H2开始可用。
entities.remarks: 若要初始化此结构，调用方必须调用 RECORDER_CONFIGURE_PARAMS_INIT。

entities.name: LogIdentifier
entities.description: LogIdentifier is a structure used in WPP (Windows Software Trace Preprocessor) logging. It contains fields for logging identifiers and timestamp configurations. The size of the field is defined by the client. It includes options for UseTimeStamp and PreciseTimeStamp, which control the granularity of timestamps added to WPP log entries. These fields are available starting from Windows 11 version 22H2.

entities.name: WppRecorderFalse
entities.description: = FALSE, WppRecorderTrue = TRUE, WppRecorderUseDefault = 2 } WPP_RECORDER_TRI_STATE, *PWPP_RECORDER_TRI_STATE; 常数

entities.name: WppRecorderTrue
entities.description: 值：TRUE 此枚举器的含义特定于其用作结构成员或函数参数。

entities.name: WppRecorderUseDefault
entities.description: 值：2 此枚举器的含义特定于其用作结构成员或函数参数。

entities.name: WPP_AUTOLOG_HEADER
entities.description: WPP auto-logging header structure

entities.name: DriverContext
entities.description: Contains offsets and sizes related to WPP_AUTOLOG_HEADER structure for WPP software tracing.

entities.name: ConfigureParams
entities.description: 指向调用方分配的RECORDER_CONFIGURE_PARAMS结构的指针
entities.remarks: 在调用 WppRecorderConfigure之前，请通过调用 RECORDER_CONFIGURE_PARAMS_INIT 分配 RECORDER_CONFIGURE_PARAMS 结构并初始化。 此方法仅配置默认日志。 默认情况下，该日志处于启用状态。 如果有自定义日志，则必须通过将 CreateDefaultLog 设置为 FALSE 来禁用默认日志。 例 C++

entities.name: RECORDER_LOG
entities.description: Retrieves the merged header and log buffer from a recorder log.

parameters.name: RecorderLog
parameters.description: 上一次调用 WppRecorderLogCreate 或 WppRecorderLogGetDefault中返回的记录器日志句柄。

parameters.name: OutBuffer
parameters.description: 指向合并标头和日志缓冲区的开头的指针。[out] OutBufferLength 指向包含合并数据的长度的 ULONG 的指针。

return_value.description: Returns STATUS_SUCCESS if successful. If unsuccessful, the out parameters are invalid.

entities.remarks: 如果作成功，则返回STATUS_SUCCESS。 如果未成功，则 out 参数无效。
